center.name: Random House Webster's Unabridged Dictionary
center.summary: Random House Webster's Unabridged Dictionary是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括紅嘴奎利亞雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Random House Webster's Unabridged Dictionary. Quelea quelea), also known as the red-billed weaver or red-billed dioch, is a small, seasonally nomadic, sparrow-like bird of the weaver family, Ploceidae, native to sub-Saharan Africa
